blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,893 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
